---
title: bash
output: 
    github_document:
        toc: true
        toc_depth: 4
editor_options: 
  chunk_output_type: inline
---

```{r setup, include = FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(
  eval = FALSE
)
```

### Basic commands 

##### cd 

```sh
# change directory
pwd
cd ~ && pwd
cd -
cd ~/Downloads && pwd
cd -
cd ../ && pwd
cd -
```

##### ln

```sh
# create a file link
# -s symbolic
ln -sv ~/Github/dotfiles/.Rprofile ~
```

##### ls

```sh
# list files
# -l print list with extra info
# -a include hidden files
ls -al
```

##### man

```sh
# get help
man ls
```

##### mkdir 

```sh
# make a directory
# -p ???
mkdir -p new_dir/new_subdir
cd !$ && pwd
```

##### pbcopy

```sh
# copy to clipboard
pbcopy < ~/.ssh/id_rsa.pub
```

##### tail

```sh
# print the tail of a file
tail -f path_to_file
```

##### touch

```sh
# make a file
touch temp.txt
echo "hello" > temp.txt
cat temp.txt
```

******************************************************************************************

### Environment variables

```{sh}
# make a variable
DIR=~/Downloads && echo $DIR
cd $DIR && pwd
cd - && pwd

# use the output of a command as a variable
echo 'my zsh is installed here:' $(which zsh)
```
